name: Requisition Sweep
reasoning: V2 best captures the prompt's core elements: white-armored officials actively confiscating glowing artifacts and enchanted relics scattered across the floor, with a desiccated corpse in robes seated centrally on a throne. The composition is balanced and readable at card size, with warm sandstone/ivory tones and golden-hour lighting. V1 depicts skeletal figures rather than officials in armor and lacks the confiscation action. V3 shows fewer artifacts being seized and has a more monolithic, less dynamic composition despite good atmosphere.

artifacts_found.issue: Skeletal figures with skull heads rather than white-armored officials; doesn't match the prompt's description of enforcement officials
Fewer visible artifacts being confiscated; less emphasis on the seizure action described in the prompt
